meta.title: My Language Coach — Practice languages. Build confidence.
meta.description: Your AI conversation partner. Talk to it, get instant corrections, and become fluent in any language — anywhere.

hero.headline: Practice languages.
hero.subheadline: Your AI conversation partner, in your pocket. Talk naturally — get instant feedback in the language you're learning.

features.title: Three things that make it work

f1.title: Speak. Get answered.
f1.body: Tap, talk, and the coach replies in real time — voice you'd swear was human.

f2.title: Corrections that teach
f2.body: Every mistake comes with a quick why-and-how, not a slap on the wrist.

f3.title: Anywhere, on your time
f3.body: Five minutes on the bus or an hour on the couch — the coach is always there.

s1.title: Pick a language
s1.body: French, German, Italian, Turkish — more on the way.

s2.title: Start talking
s2.body: Press the mic and just speak. The coach listens and replies.

s3.title: Improve every day
s3.body: Track your streaks and see how far you've come.

finalCta.title: Ready to start talking?
finalCta.subtitle: Two coffees a year would be too much. It's free during beta.
